title: Romantic multi-slide website with opening message and 2D-to-3D drawing game

requirements.summary: Add a full-page opening slide that shows the exact title text and a clear continue control.
acceptanceCriteria: On first load, the user sees a full-page opening slide.
The opening slide contains the exact text "My beautiful Wifeyyy" (same capitalization and spelling).
The opening slide provides an obvious way to continue to the next slide (e.g., button, arrow, or click/tap prompt).

file_operations.description: Create the opening full-viewport slide UI that prominently renders the exact title text "My beautiful Wifeyyy" and exposes an obvious continue affordance (e.g., button/arrow/click prompt). Use shadcn-ui (e.g., Button) to keep controls consistent; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create the top-level slides experience controller that initially shows OpeningSlide and advances to the next slide on user interaction. Use shadcn-ui (e.g., Button) for navigation controls; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire the RomanticSlidesExperience into the app render so the opening slide is the first thing visible on initial load.

requirements.summary: Implement a story-style multi-slide carousel with at least 5 romantic English text slides and forward/back navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: There are multiple (at least 5) romantic text slides in addition to the opening slide.
Users can navigate forward/backward between slides via on-screen controls.
Slide navigation works on desktop and mobile screen sizes.
Each slide displays one or more romantic lines with clear readability (sufficient contrast, consistent typography).

file_operations.description: Add a curated list of at least 5 romantic English text slides (content only) to drive the carousel UI.

Implement the carousel/story UI that renders one romantic slide at a time and provides next/prev on-screen controls (desktop + touch). Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card/Button) for consistent typography and controls; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Integrate RomanticCarousel after the opening slide and include backward/forward navigation across all post-opening slides (including the final game slide).

requirements.summary: Create a 2D-to-3D drawing mini-game on the final slide with convert, rotate/zoom, and reset controls.
acceptanceCriteria: The last slide includes a 2D drawing area where the user can draw a closed shape (mouse and touch supported).
A clear action (e.g., "Convert to 3D") generates a 3D model from the drawn 2D shape.
The generated 3D figure is visible in the UI and can be rotated (drag to orbit) and zoomed (or have simple preset camera controls).
The user can reset/clear the drawing and generate a new 3D figure without reloading the page.

file_operations.description: Create a 2D drawing surface (SVG or canvas) supporting mouse and touch input, capturing strokes and detecting/closing a shape (with a user-friendly close/finish interaction).
Implement client-side conversion from the captured 2D closed shape into a simple 3D representation (e.g., extrusion of the polygon outline into a mesh) suitable for rendering.

Render the generated 3D figure on the page and provide interaction for rotate/orbit (drag) and zoom (wheel/pinch or simple controls). If using any UI controls, use shadcn-ui (e.g., Button) for reset/presets; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Compose the final slide that includes the DrawingPad2D, a clear "Convert to 3D" action, the 3D viewer, and reset/clear actions so the user can regenerate without reloading. Use shadcn-ui Buttons for actions; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Add FinalGameSlide as the last slide in the sequence and ensure navigation reaches it while keeping the game state local to the slide (resettable).

requirements.summary: Apply a cohesive romantic theme (non-blue/purple primary palette) with consistent typography, backgrounds, spacing, and slide transitions across the experience.
acceptanceCriteria: All slides share a consistent design system (matching fonts, button styles, spacing).
Transitions between slides feel intentional (e.g., fade/slide) and match the theme.
Primary palette is not blue/purple; theme reads clearly as romantic and elegant.

file_operations.description: Adjust global theme tokens/variables and base styles to establish a romantic palette (avoid blue/purple as primary), consistent typography, and readable contrast across slides.
Extend Tailwind theme (as needed) with romantic color aliases and simple transition/animation helpers (e.g., fade/slide) to support consistent slide transitions.
Apply consistent layout, spacing, and slide transition behavior (e.g., fade/slide animations) across opening, text slides, and final game slide; ensure responsive behavior for mobile and desktop.

requirements.summary: Add required generated images under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them as visible background/decoration in the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist at frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filenames specified in imageRequirements.required.
At least one generated image is visibly used in the opening slide or overall background design.
Images are loaded directly as static assets (not via backend endpoints).

file_operations.description: Add the generated static background image asset with the exact required filename.
Add the generated decorative motif asset with the exact required filename.
Add the generated UI icons asset with the exact required filename.

Use frontend/public/assets/generated/romantic-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as a visible background and incorporate frontend/public/assets/generated/heart-floral-motif.dim_1024x1024.png as a decorative overlay consistent with the romantic theme.

Use frontend/public/assets/generated/romantic-icons.dim_512x512.png for next/prev navigation affordances (e.g., as decorative icons on controls) while keeping text accessible and readable. If any controls use shadcn-ui (e.g., Button), verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
